title: Backported Cows
description: Backports the new cow variants into past versions through a simple resource pack!
body:
# Backported Cows
A simple but effective resource pack which backports the new warm and cold cow variants! Also updates the default cow to include the new retextured temperate cow, and gives cows the snouts and horns they deserve! Each cow variant now spawns in their respective biome, including support for outdated biome IDs in older versions. 

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or both [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) installed to work.

Please use the latest version of this resource pack!!

## Download Links
Optifine: https://optifine.net/home

Entity Model Features: https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

Entity Texture Features https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

## Also check out:

**Backported Chickens**
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/backportedchickens](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/backportedchickens)

**Backported Piggies**
